{{Quote|Isn't Damien absolutely ma-a-ahvelous, dahlings?|Annah Dublavviane|<ref name="Peekoine Opera Blues">{{SpaceFantasyGamerCite|88|Peekoine Opera Blues}}</ref>}}
'''Annah Dublavviane''' was a scatterbrained [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jediboh Opera]] actress, part of the [[Tantrellius Theatre Groupe]], and was the grand dame of ''[[Two Jedi Men From Baronis]]''.

When a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] came to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Peekoine]] looking for a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], they came to one of her plays and met with her backstage. At the moment, she was preparing some [[Tea/Legends|tea]], and she forced the group to join her for some time.

{{Char-stub}}
